title: Astonish Specialist Oven & Grill Cleaner & Sponge 3 x 250g
features: Leaves Lasting Shine: Restore your oven and grill making them as good as new, with a specialist formula you will get the gleaming lasting sparkle throughout your kitchen
Lasting Fresh Scent: Banish those unpleasant odours with the beautiful sharp citrusy Orange Fresh scent, Fragrances your kitchen air with a pure refreshing aroma
No Harsh Chemicals: With no harsh chemicals there’s no need to wear gloves, unlike many other oven cleaners
Easy to Use: Also enjoy our easy-to-use tub format and surface specific sponge, making your housework hassle-free, getting the job done right
Multipack: This pack of 3 allows you to clean for longer! 3 of our cleaners means you can keep stocked up and ready to go
description: Product Description Here at Astonish we are proud of our products. Whatever your cleaning problem we aim to have a helpful cleaning solution. Now we’re not saying that we can work miracles, let’s be realistic cleaning can on occasions be hard work, but we’ve taken the time to ensure we’ve developed products that get the job done right, nothing less. Our Original Oven & Grill Cleaner is the perfect solution to for your whole oven and grill clean. Attacking the toughest of cleaning jobs other products simply can’t with the grease cutting power of orange oil. Making your cleaning simpler with no harsh chemicals there’s no need to wear protective gloves. With our easy-to-use tub format and our surface specific sponge suitable for doing the job in hand, your housework will be easier than ever before. Now available in a multipack of 3. How to Use Dampen the applicator provided with clean warm water and use this to apply the cleaning paste as needed. Rub the surface using a circular motion to lift and remove stains and food residues. Rinse clean the applicator and reapply product where necessary. Rinse and wipe clean surfaces using the sponge side of the applicator and clean warm water. For use on vitreous and powdered enamel, toughened glass and oven racking/shelves. This product contains an abrasive. Care is needed on delicate or polished surfaces to avoid scratching. Unplug electrical appliances before cleaning them. Do not use on non-stick or Teflon coatings. If use is intended on cast iron cookers or old/damaged enamel test compatibility on an inconspicuous area first. Safety: KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN. Read label before use Ingredients <5% perfumes, <5% soap, Contains d-Limonene
